items.title: GoPro Mission 1 Pro review: The best action cam video quality comes at a high price
items.summary: GoPro's Mission 1 Pro action cam has a big 1-inch sensor that offers sharp, color accurate 8K 60 fps and 4K 240 fps video.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: 7-Eleven data breach affects over 185,000 people’s personal data
items.summary: The data breach included names, dates-of-birth, postal addresses, and Social Security numbers, according to a state government listing.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Google Fitbit Air Review: Barely There, Always Running
items.summary: Google’s latest Fitbit strips away the screen without sacrificing features, delivering the most approachable and affordable wearable yet.
